Vocational School

Programs

Interior Design

MENU

It aims to train contemporary designers who can make technical drawings using art and technology to organize the interiors of buildings, who have acquired the necessary knowledge and technical equipment at international standards to realize the spaces they design, who have the confidence to design and work independently, and who are aware of professional responsibilities and ethical rules.

Our graduates can work in the design departments of furniture and decoration workshops, as project staff in restoration companies, as drafting staff or designers in architecture and engineering offices, in model making offices, etc. They will be able to work as managers, executive assistants, officials, controllers in different sectors, and as technicians in public institutions as well as in the private sector.

Education Duration:

2 Years
